okay but can we talk about how PERFECTLY they fit in this bed?? 🥺🐾

like... they literally have their own spots. the way they just KNOW where to lay. im not crying, you're crying 😭💕

these two have been inseparable since day one. milo (the cream one) always takes the left side, and lanna (the orange queen) claims her throne on the right. every. single. time. 👑

honestly this is the energy i need in my life — someone who matches my vibe AND my sleep schedule 😴✨

tag someone who would share a tiny bed with you 💕 or tag your bestie who NEEDS to see this cuteness rn!!

close encounter of the third kind 🤖👽🐾

a random robot rolls up in the middle of the street and our Poms are just standing there like… "sir, do you have treats or not?" 😐

no panic. no barking. just pure Pomeranian audacity. 💅

meanwhile every other dog in the neighborhood: 🏃💨

honestly at this point I think they would befriend an alien too 👽🤝🐾

would YOUR dog stay this chill? be honest 👇😂

📸 @mr.dogoftheday @pomeranian.world @dogsofinstagram

encuentro cercano del tercer tipo 🤖👽🐾

un robot aparece en medio de la calle y nuestros Poms están ahí como… "señor, tiene premios o no?" 😐

sin pánico. sin ladrar. pura audacia Pomerania. 💅

mientras tanto todos los otros perros del barrio: 🏃💨

honestamente creo que también se harían amigos de un alien 👽🤝🐾

#pomeranian #robot #closeencounter #unbothered #dogsofinstagram #pomlife #funnydogs #dogreels #mrdogoftheday #dogoftheday #shanghaidog #viralreels #trending #pomeranianworld #explorepage

Happy Valentine's Day from our little lovebugs 💕🐾

Today isn't just about roses and chocolates — it's a reminder that love is the most powerful force in the world. And no one teaches us that better than our dogs.

They don't love you because of what you have. They love you because you exist. That's it. No conditions. No expectations. Just pure, unconditional love.

So today, be a little more like them:
❤️ Love without keeping score
❤️ Give without expecting anything back
❤️ Show up for the people who matter — every single day

Because at the end of the day, the love you give is the love you keep.

Happy Valentine's Day to everyone — whether you're spending it with your partner, your family, your friends, or your furry soulmate 🐾💗

📸 @mr.dogoftheday @pomeranian.world @dogsofinstagram

---

Feliz Día de San Valentín de nuestros pequeños enamorados 💕🐾

Hoy no se trata solo de rosas y chocolates — es un recordatorio de que el amor es la fuerza más poderosa del mundo. Y nadie nos lo enseña mejor que nuestros perros.

No te aman por lo que tienes. Te aman porque existes. Sin condiciones. Sin expectativas. Solo amor puro e incondicional.

Así que hoy, sé un poco más como ellos:
❤️ Ama sin llevar la cuenta
❤️ Da sin esperar nada a cambio
❤️ Aparece por las personas que importan — todos los días
